ideation: This sequence will depict a gesture of reverence or prayer.  The animation will start with arms at the sides, then move to a prayer pose, hold briefly, and then return to the resting position. This uses the existing examples to guide the construction and range of motion.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at the sides
arms rise together, palms inward, in prayer
holding the sacred moment in quiet contemplation
arms return to rest, reverence complete
